name: Miracle's Dawn
acquisitionSource: Clear Special Ops: The Color of Blood
descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] {STR}. Until your next turn, whenever you take Active DMG, gain Delayed Shield equal to [Arg2]% of that DMG. If the Realms includes {Caro}, instead accumulate {Crimson Furnace} equal to 10% of that DMG.
lore: Miracle's Dawn descends upon the Church tainted by Madness, at the cost of the blood of the willing sacrifice and the immaculate lover.
